title: Cobblemon Wonder Trade
description: Wonder trade system for Cobblemon - trade pokemon in for a random pokemon from a pool built up by players
body: ### [Please consider supporting me on ko-fi if you like the mod and can afford it, I appreciate even 1 dollar. ](https://ko-fi.com/raguto) --- _**I grant permission to anyone seeking to add my mod to a modpack**_ --- ## Cobblemon Wonder Trade A Wonder Trade system for Cobblemon! Random trade your Pokémon with other players or receive random ones from the global pool. ---- ### Features: - Global Trade Pool - Pokémon traded by players are stored and can be received by others - Rarity Matching - Legendary, Mythical, Ultra Beasts, and Paradox Pokémon will only trade for other legendary-tier Pokémon - Random Fallback - When the pool is empty, receive a randomly generated Pokémon matching your trade's rarity tier - Server Configurable Cooldown - Default 10 minutes between trades (adjustable) - Optional Level Matching - Enable to receive Pokémon within a configurable level range of what you traded - Persistent Pool - Trade pool saves across server restarts ---- ### How It Works: 1. Place a Wonder Trade Station 1. Right-click to open the GUI 1. Select a Pokémon from your party Click Trade and receive a mystery Pokémon in return! ---- ### Configuration: Access settings via Mod Menu (Fabric) or edit config/cobblemon_wonder_trade.json: - tradeCooldownMinutes - Time between trades (default: 10) - levelMatching - Match received Pokémon level to traded one (default: false) - levelMatchRange - Level variance when matching (default: ±10)
